english: Salutations to you O great illusion, worshipped by gods at the auspicious seat
roman: Namaste astu Mahamaye Shripite Sura pujite

english: O bearer of conch, discus and mace — salutations to you O Mahalakshmi
roman: Shankha chakra gadaa haste Mahalakshmi namostu te

english: Salutations to you mounted on Garuda, terrible to the demon Kola
O Goddess who removes all sins — salutations to you O Mahalakshmi
roman: Sarva papa hare Devi Mahalakshmi namostu te

english: O omniscient one, granter of all boons, terrible to all wicked beings
roman: Sarvagne sarva varade sarva dushta bhayankari

english: O Goddess who removes all sorrows — salutations to you O Mahalakshmi
roman: Sarva dukha hare Devi Mahalakshmi namostu te

english: O Goddess who bestows achievement and wisdom, giver of enjoyment and liberation
roman: Siddhi buddhi prade Devi bhukti mukti pradayini

hindi: मन्त्रपूते सदा देवि महालक्ष्मि नमोऽस्तु ते॥
english: Ever purified by mantras, O Goddess — salutations to you O Mahalakshmi
roman: Mantra muurte sada Devi Mahalakshmi namostu te

english: This Mahalakshmi Ashtakam — whoever reads it with devotion
roman: Mahalakshmy ashtakam stotram yah pathed bhaktiman narah

english: Attains all perfections and always attains sovereignty
roman: Sarva siddhi mavapnoti rajyam prapnoti sarvada
